caption: A man with a large, spiked grey wig, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone. He wears a white short-sleeved button-down shirt with a red bow tie and yellow suspenders. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing displays, including shirts labeled "LEE." A logo appears on the screen reading "BOSS TALK JOY" along with "PODCAST." As the sequence progresses, the man continues to speak, shifting his gaze and adjusting his posture. In the final moments, he raises his right hand toward his chin, revealing a gold watch on his wrist. The camera remains stationary, keeping the man centered as he engages in conversation.
